name: @ondewo/nlu-client-nodejs
description: ONDEWO Natural Language Understanding (NLU) Client library for Nodejs
author: ONDEWO GmbH <office@ondewo.com>

scripts.pretest: tsc auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build
scripts.test:examples: tsc examples/listAgents.ts examples/listAgents.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build && ln -sfn ../api .test-build/api && node --test .test-build/examples/listAgents.spec.js
